tagline: AI Gateway (Beta) is the enterprise control plane for governing LLM endpoints and coding agents with enhanced features, including a rich UI, improved observability, and expanded API coverage.
what_it_does: AI Gateway (Beta) is the enterprise control plane for governing LLM endpoints and coding agents with enhanced features, including a rich UI, improved observability, and expanded API coverage. Beta This page covers the new Unity AI Gateway (visible in the sidebar of the UI), which is currently in Beta. Account admins can enable access to this feature in the account console Previews page.
why_it_matters: AI Gateway (Beta) is the enterprise control plane for governing LLM endpoints and coding agents with enhanced features, including a rich UI, improved observability, and expanded API coverage.

capabilities.title: An end-to-end path for administrators
capabilities.desc: An end-to-end path for administrators to govern access to AI assets, traffic and cost, and the content of requests and responses.

capabilities.title: Tutorial: Govern a coding agent's
capabilities.desc: Tutorial: Govern a coding agent's GitHub MCP access

capabilities.title: Restrict a coding agent's access
capabilities.desc: Restrict a coding agent's access to GitHub MCP tools using Unity Catalog permissions and a built-in service policy.

key_takeaway: AI Gateway (Beta) is the enterprise control plane for governing LLM endpoints and coding agents with enhanced features, including a rich UI, improved observability, and expanded API coverage.
